subcodes.first_line: We have beheld thy turning unto Us, and We have turned unto thee from this Station wherein the Tongue of Grandeur proclaimeth: There is no [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد راینا اقبالک اقبلنا الیک من هذا المقام الذی ینطق فیه لسان العظمه انه لا
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
